About.title: About Ecare
About.subtitle: We are a client-first developer agency delivering high-integrity software.
About.ourStoryBody: Founded with a mission to eliminate technical debt, Ecare builds robust software systems. We combine design excellence with rigid engineering standards to build long-lasting solutions.
About.ourGoalBody: Since day one, Ecare has been committed to utilizing modern cloud architectures and high-fidelity frameworks to solve real-world business challenges. We combine deep engineering expertise and cutting-edge technologies to build powerful, scalable custom web applications. Whether you need an enterprise eCommerce platform, a custom business SaaS, or a robust integration API, we have you covered. Over time, we have grown into a trusted technology partner, delivering solutions that meet the evolving needs of our clients.
About.integrityDesc: We do the right thing, even when nobody is watching. Code quality is a moral imperative.
About.longevityDesc: We build products to run 5+ years without continuous rewrite or high maintenance costs.
About.missionDesc: To build high-integrity software that stands the test of time, enabling our clients to scale their operations with absolute confidence.
About.visionDesc: To become the global standard for high-fidelity developer agencies, where engineering craftsmanship meets real-world business needs.
About.whyUsDesc: We combine modern agile workflows with rigorous software engineering practices.
About.whyUsVal1Desc: We enforce strict code formatting, linting, and comprehensive static analysis. We never compromise on structural integrity for speed.
About.whyUsVal2Desc: Our team consists exclusively of senior engineers, product designers, and solution architects who have scaling expertise.
About.whyUsVal3Desc: We operate as an extension of your own engineering team, maintaining fully transparent git workflows, Slack/Discord communication, and daily updates.
About.journeySubtitle: How we built a legacy of premium engineering, one milestone at a time.
About.journey2026Desc: Expanding our elite team to support cutting-edge AI integrations and developing high-performance next-gen web architectures.
About.journey2025Desc: Scaling our partner applications and SaaS platforms, serving millions of users worldwide with zero-downtime engineering.
About.journey2023Desc: Founded with a core mission to eliminate technical debt, combining rigid engineering standards with client-first design.
About.atGlanceSub: Ecare is a leading name in the SaaS and web software industry, empowering hundreds of thousands of businesses globally with high-performance digital tools.
About.ctaDesc: Get in touch with our team of elite developers and start planning your next project.

EzyCheckout.heroTitle: Convert WooCommerce Visitors Instantly via Popup Checkout
EzyCheckout.heroSub: Ezy Checkout adds a highly customizable popup-based checkout flow directly on your WooCommerce store to boost conversions by up to 40%.
EzyCheckout.featuresSub: Ezy Checkout replaces long multi-step checkouts with single-click custom checkout popups.
EzyCheckout.feat1Desc: Beautiful checkout modal with configurable forms, placeholders, and dynamic validation.
EzyCheckout.feat2Desc: Apply coupons directly inside the popup checkout with smart abuse protection checks.
EzyCheckout.feat3Desc: Real-time server-side validation for address inputs and dynamic shipping method updates.
EzyCheckout.feat4Desc: Effortlessly control styles, colors, layouts, and texts using a simple settings dashboard.
EzyCheckout.feat5Desc: Run popup checkouts across multiple WooCommerce client stores with ease.
EzyCheckout.feat6Desc: Extensible hooks and filters to programmatically customize fields and processes.
EzyCheckout.step1Desc: Customer clicks the fast-checkout button on your shop archive or product detail page.
EzyCheckout.step2Desc: Popup checkout modal appears instantly. The customer fills details and enters coupons.
EzyCheckout.step3Desc: Payment processing completes and the order is registered securely inside WooCommerce.
EzyCheckout.faqA1: Yes, it integrates directly with WooCommerce. It uses WooCommerce backend APIs to create and process orders securely.
EzyCheckout.faqQ2: Does this replace the default WooCommerce checkout page?
EzyCheckout.faqA2: No, it adds a popup option for fast-checkouts, but your default checkout page remains active for customers who prefer it.
EzyCheckout.faqA3: Yes. All customer data is processed locally on your server. Ezy Checkout does not store or share data with external services.
EzyCheckout.pricingSub: Get started with the best popup checkout experience for your business.
EzyCheckout.planFreeDesc: Basic popup layout and standard checkout forms.
EzyCheckout.planProDesc: Unlimited styling, coupon validation, priority support, and multi-site licensing.
EzyCheckout.manageTitle: Full Control Over Checkout Styling & Fields
EzyCheckout.manageSub: Customize checkout fields, borders, colors, and button animations directly from your WordPress admin dashboard to perfectly align with your brand identity.
EzyCheckout.managePoint1: Interactive Color Picker for modal overlays, backgrounds, and buttons
EzyCheckout.managePoint2: Choose between 6+ button micro-animations and typography configurations
EzyCheckout.managePoint3: Ajax-powered settings panel with instant save capabilities
EzyCheckout.historySub: Ezy Checkout handles WooCommerce integrations gracefully, from coupon abuse protection to CartFlows compatibility options.
EzyCheckout.historyPoint2: CartFlows compatibility options to avoid layout conflicts
EzyCheckout.historyPoint3: Quantity selectors and order notes support inside popup

EzyCheckout.appInterfaceHeader: Application with the best user interface convert visitor into leads
EzyCheckout.quickCheckoutDesc: Ezy Checkout is a simple yet powerful plugin for WooCommerce that allows customers to complete their purchases via a popup modal without leaving the page.
EzyCheckout.instantCheckoutDesc: Let customers checkout instantly with a beautifully styled modal popup window.
EzyCheckout.couponShippingDesc: Apply WooCommerce coupons dynamically with live validation inside the checkout modal.
EzyCheckout.freeFeature4: Change product quantity inside the popup
EzyCheckout.freeFeature5: Enable or disable extra order notes field
EzyCheckout.proFeature2: Show instant discounts when coupons are applied
EzyCheckout.proFeature3: Calculate shipping charges automatically by address

EzyCheckout.proFeature6: Works smoothly with any theme or page builder
EzyCheckout.proFeature7: 1 year of direct priority support & updates

problem.titleHtml: Why Most Bangladeshi E-commerce Websites Fail
problem.sub: Developing a gorgeous storefront is easy, but local operations require a system optimized to solve day-to-day transaction barriers.

card1.title: Complex Multi-Step Checkouts
card1.desc: Every extra form field reduces conversions. International checkout themes confuse local customers, leading to cart abandonment.

card2.title: Developers Disappear After Handover
card2.desc: Freelancers and agencies deliver a basic theme but fail to provide updates or support, leaving you stuck with critical system bugs.

card3.title: Fake Order Waste & Return Refusals
card3.desc: High percentages of fake COD (Cash on Delivery) orders drain courier delivery fee budgets and deplete inventory status.

card4.title: Broken Facebook Pixel Tracking
card4.desc: Standard pixel setups miss browser events due to iOS 14+ and Safari blockers. Your Meta Ads system trains on incomplete statistics.

card5.title: Heavy Plugins Make Sites Bloated & Slow
card5.desc: Using standard platforms loaded with 30+ conflicting plugins slows page speed, causing high bounce rates on slow 3G/4G connections.

card6.title: Domain Renews but Revenue Doesn't Grow
card6.desc: E-commerce structures that are not connected to local couriers and automated confirmation pipelines generate heavy management overhead.
